orgPolicy.title: Hire Error Notifications Moving to Pod Slack Channels
orgPolicy.summary: HRIS will soon share recruiter-related hire errors in dedicated pod Slack channels (e.g., R&D, CX) instead of individual DMs. Recruiters will be added to their pod channels and HRIS will tag the appropriate recruiter when action is needed.
bullets: Hire errors will route to pod Slack channels instead of direct messages
Recruiters will be added to their respective pod channels
HRIS will tag the recruiter when action is required
Coming very soon — watch your pod channel

tp.point: Watch for hire errors in your pod channel, not DMs

orgPolicy.title: InviteOS Release 3 is Live — Debrief Agent + Feature Release Tracker
orgPolicy.summary: Two new Cycle 2 features launched June 26: (1) Debrief Agent auto-pulls and organizes scorecard data into a structured debrief summary; (2) Feature Release Tracker gives a real-time view of every feature build and allows idea submission and voting.
bullets: Debrief Agent: AI automatically organizes scorecard data into structured debrief summary — watch the Loom walkthrough
Feature Release Tracker: real-time view of what's live, in progress, and coming next
Submit new ideas and vote on features directly from OS
PeopleOS Release Notes now live in Notion (linked from PeopleOS Hub)
Log into PeopleOS via Okta every day — use it, explore it, share feedback

tp.point: Log into PeopleOS daily and use the new Debrief Agent for your debrief prep

orgPolicy.title: Invite PE Elevated Self-Service in Greenhouse
orgPolicy.summary: PEs now have elevated permissions in Greenhouse, enabling more self-service. PEs can create Evergreens and Confidential reqs directly in GH, and close & re-open reqs — no ticket needed.
bullets: PEs can now create Evergreens & Confidential reqs directly in Greenhouse
PEs can close & re-open reqs in Greenhouse without submitting a ticket
EIB bulk req uploads now processed by HRIS Ops team (still submit via PHC ticket)

tp.point: Self-serve on GH req creation and closures — no ticket needed

orgPolicy.title: Cascade: Share Gusto Role & Team Name Updates with Recruiters
orgPolicy.summary: Gusto is transitioning away from calling areas 'Apps' or 'Products' — they are now 'Domains' and we do 'Actions' for customers within those Domains. Certain seniority words should be removed from job postings and team communications.
bullets: Refer to business areas as 'Domains' (not 'Apps' or 'Products')
Remove the following words from job postings and team communications: Senior, Principal, Director, Manager, Lead
Focus on role, responsibility, and scope of work in job descriptions

tp.point: Update job postings and comms to remove seniority words and use 'Domains'

items.heading: Independence Day — Friday July 3
bullets: Gusto is closed Friday, July 3rd — company holiday
Plan interview scheduling, offers, and candidate comms around this date
July 3 is also the due date for several PE action items — plan accordingly
items.source: Gusto FY27 Holiday Calendar + #invite-team (Kristin Ruehle, June 23, 2026)

items.heading: FY27 Company KRs — Ratification Expected July 1
bullets: Five objectives total; Objective 5 KRs directly affect how and where we hire
Key themes: job family consolidation and hiring within Gusto hubs
New Product/Agentic category focused on Gus (Gusto's agentic platform)
DRIs landing recommended targets ahead of State of G — more at People All Hands

items.heading: Laura Lockwood on Leave — Elan Bailey is Day-to-Day POC
bullets: Laura is on leave effective June 22
Elan Bailey is the day-to-day point of contact for People Central
Kristin Ruehle and Saumya Chopra available for escalations
If something typically goes to Laura, loop in Elan first

items.heading: Goose is Coming — People Insights + Invite PEs to Align
bullets: Live demo from Arthur Gonzalez to People Staff
People Insights will work with Invite PEs on communication, usage, and functionality before broader launch
More details to come

items.heading: Raising the Talent Bar — Kristin Named DRI
bullets: Kristin is a named DRI alongside Dashini Jeyathurai on this Cycle 2 priority
Spans pre-hire (VMA+ evolution), development (PE enablement), and quarterly performance (FY27 talent system design)
Expect more from Kristin as execution ramps

items.heading: Workday ↔ Google Calendar Integration Now Live
bullets: Time off submitted in Workday now automatically syncs to your calendar and your PE's calendar
No more manual calendar blocks needed

items.heading: Invite Onsite — July 13–14, Denver
bullets: July 13 (PE day): 9am meet, 9:30am–12pm final run-of-show, lunch, Pedal Hopper around RiNo → Bierstadt Lagerhaus Welcome Party
July 14: Full team onsite day (activity TBD by survey votes)
Use #temp-invite-onsite-july-2026 for all onsite comms (not #invite-team)
Onsite activity voting closed EOD June 25 — results TBD

bullets: 🟡 This Week priority
